codeReview.summary: CONTRIBUTING.md is a generic placeholder (60 bytes) and does not contain any substantive content. No commit corresponds to a 'write-contributing-md' feature implementation; the file remains as it was from initial repo setup (commit 4e6d427). The file contains only '# Contributing' followed by 'Contributions welcome. Details coming soon.' — no branching strategy, change types, validation requirements, PR process, review guidelines, or spec/tooling distinction.

issues.description: File is empty placeholder. Criteria 2-8 all fail: no branching strategy defined, no change type categories (0 of 4 required), no validation requirements defined, no PR submission process defined, no review guidelines defined, no distinction between spec and tooling changes, content is generic not substantive.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-md-standard repo lacks the standard Factory mission structure (features.json, handoffs/, worker-transcripts.jsonl) that the scrutiny-reviewer skill expects. The AGENTS.md does not document the expected project structure for mission artifacts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission dir /root/lovkode.no/ui-md-standard has no features.json, no handoffs/ directory, no worker-transcripts.jsonl. The skill prompt references these but they don't exist in this repo.

summary: FAIL — CONTRIBUTING.md is a 60-byte placeholder with no substantive content. Does not define branching strategy, change types (breaking spec, non-breaking spec, tooling, docs-only), validation requirements, PR process, review guidelines, or spec vs tooling distinction. No evidence of a 'write-contributing-md' feature worker having run; file has been untouched since initial repo setup (commit 4e6d427).
